plugins.prepareCmd: IFS='.' read -r MAJOR MINOR PATCH <<< '${nextRelease.version}' && VERSION_CODE=$((MAJOR * 1000000 + MINOR * 1000 + PATCH)) && sed -i "s/versionCode = [0-9]*/versionCode = $VERSION_CODE/" app/build.gradle.kts && sed -i "s/versionName = \"[^\"]*\"/versionName = \"${nextRelease.version}\"/" app/build.gradle.kts
